title: epidendrum bitriangulare
intro: Epidendrum bitriangulare, also known as the three-angled orchid, is a species of orchid native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Epidendrum bitriangulare is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
